title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 135.475 - Rebuilding communities and neighborhood preservation act cited
text:
135.475.  Rebuilding communities and neighborhood preservation act cited. — Sections 135.475 to 135.487 shall be known and may be cited as the "Rebuilding Communities and Neighborhood Preservation Act".
(L. 1999 S.B. 20 § 1) 
Effective 1-01-00
